notion_queue.line: Notion queue sweep: not_checked; repo-local system queue has 4 active/queued item(s).

rows.title: Keep the local dashboard visibly tied to the freshest scheduled build
rows.why: A stale local tab can contradict origin/main scheduled proof and make operators distrust the cockpit.
rows.done_when: The local server either tracks the latest scheduled origin/main artifact or clearly reports checkout, branch, commit, feed timestamp, and hash in the UI and health endpoint.

rows.title: Keep source scoring honest until graded outcomes reach threshold
rows.why: Source scoring should refresh daily but remain off until enough closed graded calls exist. Lowering thresholds or fake backfills would create false confidence.
rows.done_when: source_rates regenerates from real source_calls, reports n=0 or insufficient data honestly, and flips on only when n>=15 per scored source/tier.

rows.title: Make Fundstrat inbox checked/not-checked state explainable
rows.why: The cockpit must say whether the Fundstrat inbox was actually checked this render, not hide Gmail/Chrome gaps behind cached daily calls.
rows.done_when: Fundstrat intake surfaces last checked time, access path, snippet-only/full-body counts, and explicit not_checked reasons in the feed.

rows.title: Make the cockpit show why nothing is actionable
rows.why: When there are no ACT_NOW rows, the operator needs the blocking reason, next proof needed, sizing implication, and time sensitivity rather than a quiet dashboard.
rows.done_when: The primary cockpit surfaces blocked-but-important candidates with proof gaps, timing sensitivity, sizing impact, and next operator step.

findings.title: Notion System Update Queue not checked
findings.line: Notion queue rows were not supplied to this read-only sweep; repo-local queue state cannot prove live Notion status.
findings.next_step: Run with a Notion queue export/connector snapshot when doing the weekly debt review.
